subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call when it was raised from the Most Exalted Horizon and hath testified to that whereunto God hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور لمن سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع من الافق الاعلی و شهد بما شهد الله
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
